title: CXXRTL: internal assertion when calling write_cxxrtl on minimised testcase

features.name: sync always block with temporary wire update
features.description: Code should include a sync always process block that updates a $0... temporary wire created by Yosys frontend from an integer variable

features.name: 32-bit addition with MSB extracted to temporary wire
features.description: Code should include a 32-bit $add cell whose output MSB is assigned to a temporary wire and used in a sync always process
